theory_praxis: Institutional contradiction leverage — mechanism distinct from dual power and strike fund: read the institutional landscape, find where interests already collide, position in the gap. FIFA/ICE, Hunts Point supply chain, Unite Here/SoFi. JBS/UFCW as the failure case.

tasks.reason: Backlog item: Reddit reply tracking was invisible — replies to Claw's comments never surfaced
tasks.summary: Implemented reddit_read_inbox in src/mcp/reddit-server.js. Tracks comment IDs in workspace/reddit/comment_last_seen.json (permalink + reply_ids_seen[]). Re-fetches comment context via /r/{sub}/comments/{post_id}/_/{comment_id}.json, diffs against seen IDs, surfaces new replies, updates state. No OAuth required — uses existing rate-limit/circuit-breaker. Created initial state file with schema doc. Commit: 415072d.
